text:
“I compete in the Olympic Games TOMORROW and can’t even pay my rent,” wrote 24-year-old Team USA athlete Veronica Fraley ahead of her Olympic debut.

BuzzFeed Staff

I compete in the Olympic Games TOMORROW and can’t even pay my rent 😒 my school only sent about 75% of my rent while they pay football players (who haven’t won anything 😂) enough to buy new cars and houses 👎🏾👎🏾👎🏾

The athlete laterfollowed up, “Thanks for the supporting messages but I want to clarify my irritation isn’t with the school itself, mainly the rules that bar me from making the amount I’m WORTH as a collegiate athlete such as NIL which favors popularity over performance. that’s all I’m sayin. Wish me luck tm!”

Flav has facedcontroversy numeroustimes over the years; hespent a monthin jail in 1991 for assaulting his girlfriend at the time, and more recently, in 2021, hepleaded no contestto a misdemeanor coercion charge from "grabbing a phone" during an incident with a female member of his household.

I gotchu,,, DM me and I’ll send payment TODAY so you don’t have to worry bout it TOMORROW,,, and imma be rooting for ya tomorrow LETZ GO,!!!

Got you! DM me your $cashtaghttps://t.co/X7byXz5oV7

Update! It is done.pic.twitter.com/WEX18Gny60

THANK YOU &@FlavorFlavSO MUCH 😭🥹 this makes every difference in the WORLD & I hope to represent team USA well this week 🇺🇸❤️https://t.co/L1VzCJCjbm

“Dude... you are awesome. Best thing I’ve seen on X in ages,” someonewrotein response to Alexis. “Serena married a great man who is her #1 fan and he is such an advocate for women! We love to see it!” saidanother.

"Flav is the hero we didn’t know we needed," read oneviral postwith over 18,000 likes. "Love how he continues to support women with his actions!!!" someonereplied.

BuzzFeed Staff
title: Alexis Ohanian, Flavor Flav Help Olympic Athlete Pay Rent
description: “I compete in the Olympic Games TOMORROW and can’t even pay my rent,” wrote 24-year-old Team USA athlete Veronica Fraley ahead of her Olympic debut.
